parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT om.user_id FROM positioning.own_messaging om;

SELECT 'voc' AS source, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM research.voc_entries e WHERE e.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND e.dimension IN ('language', 'criteria') AND e.first_seen >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '2 months') UNION ALL SELECT 'ci' AS source, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM public.classified_changes cc WHERE cc.primary_tag = 'positioning' AND cc.detected_at >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '2 months') UNION ALL SELECT 'narrative' AS source, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM diff_tracker.narrative_arcs na WHERE na.status = 'active' AND na.first_seen >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months');
SELECT hs.total_score FROM positioning.health_scores hs WHERE hs.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY hs.score_month DESC LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO positioning.health_scores (user_id, score_month, total_score, buyer_alignment_score, differentiation_score, narrative_fit_score, dimensions_available, breakdown, trend_vs_prior, prior_total_score) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.score_month }}'::date, {{ $json.total_score }}, {{ $json.buyer_alignment_score }}, {{ $json.differentiation_score }}, {{ $json.narrative_fit_score }}, ARRAY[{{ $json.dimensions_available.map(d => "'" + d + "'").join(',') }}]::text[], '{{ $json.breakdown }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.trend_vs_prior }}', {{ $json.prior_total_score !== null ? $json.prior_total_score : 'NULL' }}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, score_month) DO UPDATE SET total_score = EXCLUDED.total_score, buyer_alignment_score = EXCLUDED.buyer_alignment_score, differentiation_score = EXCLUDED.differentiation_score, narrative_fit_score = EXCLUDED.narrative_fit_score, dimensions_available = EXCLUDED.dimensions_available, breakdown = EXCLUDED.breakdown, trend_vs_prior = EXCLUDED.trend_vs_prior, prior_total_score = EXCLUDED.prior_total_score;
